transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you planning to see the student theater performance this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I already bought my ticket because last year's shows sold out quickly.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the man buy his ticket early?

questions.prompt: Why did the man buy his ticket early?

choices.text: He is performing in the play.
He wanted to avoid missing a sold-out show.
His friend bought the ticket for him.

questions.explanation: He bought the ticket early because previous performances sold out quickly.
questions.evidence: Last year's shows sold out quickly.
